rooms.name: Entrance Hall
rooms.summary: The entrance hall is decorated in a modern, neutral style featuring light oak-effect laminate flooring, white painted walls and skirting, and a high-quality walnut-effect entrance door. The overall condition is good, though the walls display several localized scuff marks and rub marks consistent with daily use. Cleanliness is of a domestic standard throughout, with only minor dust in hard-to-reach areas like the closet shelf.

items.name: Walls
items.description: Plaster walls with light cream/white emulsion finish.
defects: Multiple light grey scuff marks and rub marks at mid to low level across various walls
Scuff markings adjacent to switches on entrance wall

items.name: Ceiling
items.description: Smooth plaster ceiling with white emulsion finish.

defects: Light surface scratching to letterbox flap

rooms.name: Walk In Wardrobe
rooms.summary: The walk-in wardrobe is in good, clean decorative order, featuring white emulsioned walls, a grey cut-pile carpet, and built-in wardrobes with wood-effect interiors. Overall cleanliness is to a domestic standard, with only minor cosmetic scuffs and superficial marks observed on the walls and door faces.

items.name: Ceiling
items.description: Plastered ceiling with white emulsion finish.

items.name: Walls
items.description: White emulsioned plaster walls with matching white timber skirting boards.
defects: Faint hairline scratches and scuffs at mid level (P180)
Faint rub marks and light blemishes at knee level near skirting board (P183, P184)

items.name: Carpeted flooring
items.description: Grey cut-pile carpet.
defects: Light pile shading from foot traffic

defects: Minor blemish to low level of door face (P178)
Faint hairline scuffs to door face near handle (P179)
Faint scuff mark to bottom edge of door face (P181)

items.name: Built-in wardrobes
items.description: Multi-compartment built-in wardrobe system with white exterior doors, grey/brown wood-effect laminate interior shelving/frames, and brown-painted back panels. Includes hanging rails and integrated warm-white LED light strips.
defects: Light surface wear to the leading edge of white doors (P189)

rooms.name: Reception & Open Plan Kitchen
rooms.summary: The reception and open-plan kitchen is in excellent decorative and structural condition overall, presenting modern and high-specification fittings throughout. The cleanliness of the room, including the kitchen cabinetry, integrated appliances, and utility area, is maintained to a very high professional standard. Minor localized blemish wear is noted on the soft furnishings, some wall corners, and the window glazing exterior.

items.name: Ceiling
items.description: Plastered and emulsioned flat white ceiling with recessed LED spotlights, white integrated air extraction vent grilles, and circular smoke detector alarms.

defects: scuff mark mid level right hand side to wall external corner adjacent to door frame
scuff marks mid level to splashback area behind kettle counter run

rooms.name: Bedroom
rooms.summary: A modern double bedroom in good decorative condition, featuring neutral emulsioned walls, grey carpet, and a large window looking onto an active construction site. The room is furnished with a double bed with a dark grey button-tufted headboard, white textured chest of drawers and matching bedside cabinets. Cleanliness is generally to a domestic standard, though the window glazing requires cleaning due to external construction dust, and some wall scuffs and a minor mattress tear are present.

items.name: Ceiling
items.description: Plastered ceiling, emulsioned in off-white/light grey, with recessed downlights and an AC ventilation grille.

items.name: Walls
items.description: Plastered walls, emulsioned in off-white/light grey.
defects: Minor rub marks to wall above headboard level
Scuff mark to wall at mid level

Small circular brown stain at mid level to the right of the headboard

rooms.name: Bathroom
rooms.summary: The bathroom is finished to a high luxury standard with large marble-effect floor tiles, dark marble feature walls, and sleek integrated cabinetry. Overall decorative condition is good with only minor superficial wall scratches, and cleanliness is high, save for minor limescale residues on wet fittings and light surface dust on horizontal surrounds.

items.name: Ceiling
items.description: Smooth plastered ceiling, painted in flat white emulsion.

items.name: Walls
items.description: Combination of large-format horizontal gloss beige ceramic wall tiles, high-gloss dark grey marble-effect feature tiles, and white-painted plaster sections.
defects: Light surface scratches/scuffs eye level to the painted wall segment as shown in photo P012

items.name: Flooring
items.description: High-gloss dark grey porcelain tiles with prominent white marble veining.

rooms.name: Balcony
rooms.summary: The balcony is in good decorative and structural order, showing light weathering and minor outdoor dust consistent with normal exposure. The composite decking boards, metal balustrade, and glazed access door are all clean, stable, and free of any notable damage.

items.description: Grey composite decking boards with a ribbed non-slip profile, laid horizontally.
defects: Light weathering and minor water spots consistent with outdoor exposure

items.name: Balustrade

defects: Light surface dust and weathering
